zh.lifeSummary: 當William Abernethy 1st Baron Saltoun於1222年出生在蘇格蘭培爾阿波內時，他的父親Laurence Abernethy48歲，母親Mary Devorguilla de Galloway37歲。他於大約1251年與Margaret De Lindsay結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1291年6月28日在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾易亞斯特 薩爾圖享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Abernethy 1st Baron Saltoun于1222年出生在苏格兰培爾阿波內时，他的父亲Laurence Abernethy48岁，母亲Mary Devorguilla de Galloway37岁。他于大约1251年与Margaret De Lindsay结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1291年6月28日在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾易亞斯特 薩爾圖享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Abernethy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abernathy
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Abernethy 1st Baron Saltoun was born in 1222, in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Laurence Abernethy, was 48 and his mother, Mary Devorguilla de Galloway, was 37. He married Margaret De Lindsay about 1251. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 28 June 1291, in East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Abernethy 1st Baron Saltoun est né en 1222, à Abernethy, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Laurence Abernethy, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Mary Devorguilla de Galloway, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Margaret De Lindsay environ 1251. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 28 juin 1291, à East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Abernethy 1st Baron Saltoun 1222 in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Laurence Abernethy 48 und seine Mutter Mary Devorguilla de Galloway 37. Er hat um 1251 Margaret De Lindsay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 28. Juni 1291 im Alter von 69 Jahren in East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Abernethy 1st Baron Saltoun è nato il nel 1222 nel Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Laurence Abernethy, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Mary Devorguilla de Galloway, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Margaret De Lindsay circa 1251. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 28 giugno 1291, nel East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Abernethy 1st Baron Saltounが1222年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシーで生まれた時，父Laurence Abernethyは48歳，母Mary Devorguilla de Gallowayは37歳であった。約1251年にMargaret De Lindsayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1291年6月28日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアエアスト サルトウンで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Abernethy 1st Baron Saltoun(이)가 1222년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압어네시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Laurence Abernethy(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Devorguilla de Galloway(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1251년 Margaret De Lindsay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1291년 6월 28일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 이스트 살토우에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Abernethy 1st Baron Saltoun nasceu em 1222, em Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Laurence Abernethy, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Mary Devorguilla de Galloway, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret De Lindsay aproximadamente 1251. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 28 de junho de 1291, em East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Abernethy 1st Baron Saltoun родился в 1222 г. в местности абирнети, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Laurence Abernethy было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Devorguilla de Galloway, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret De Lindsay около 1251 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 28 июня 1291 г. в местности эаст салтоун, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Abernethy 1st Baron Saltoun nació en 1222, en Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Laurence Abernethy, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Mary Devorguilla de Galloway, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Margaret De Lindsay aproximadamente 1251. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 28 de junio de 1291, en East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 69 años.
